nodes.name: Install
nodes.description: Language to be installed or being installed.

children.description: Language tag of the language to be installed or being installed.

children.name: CopyToDeviceInternationalSettings
children.description: Copies the language to the international settings (i.e., locale, input layout, speech recognizer, preferred UI language) of the device immediately after installation if the value is true. Default value is false.

enum.description: Don't copy the language to the international settings immediately after installation.
Copy the language to the international settings immediately after installation.

children.name: EnableLanguageFeatureInstallations
children.description: Enables installations of all available language features when the value is true. Default value is true.

enum.description: Install only the required language features.

children.name: ErrorCode
children.description: Error code of queued language installation. 0 if there is no error.

children.name: StartInstallation
children.description: Execution node to queue a language for installation on the device.

children.name: Status
children.description: Status of the language queued for install. 0 – not started; 1 – in progress; 2 – succeeded; 3 – failed; 4 – partially succeeded.

nodes.name: InstalledLanguages
nodes.description: Languages currently installed on the device.

children.description: Language tag of an installed language on the device. Delete to uninstall.

children.name: LanguageFeatures
children.description: Numeric representation of the language features installed. Basic Typing - 1 (0x1), Fonts - 2 (0x2), Handwriting - 4 (0x4), Speech - 8 (0x8), TextToSpeech - 16 (0x10), OCR - 32 (0x20), LocaleData - 64 (0x40), SupplementFonts - 128 (0x80).

children.name: Providers
children.description: Numeric representation of how a language is installed. 1 - The system language pack is installed; 2 - The Local Experience Pack is installed; 3 - Both are installed.

children.name: SystemPreferredUILanguages
children.description: System Preferred UI Language of the device.
